finding_results.notes: Replaced meta framing with in-world close-third cognition and preserved constrained realization (no salvation, only narrow pathway) without chapter/story terminology.

Added specific ledger identifier (HAN MIJEONG / SEONGSAN 302 / KRW 480,000 / GAS RESTART + BOY INHALER) and immediate embodied consequence logic tied to a named household before release-time sequencing resumes.

Expanded father-daughter aftermath with explicit callback to the call wording ('An officer may visit'), concrete household fallout (lost shift pay and landlord immediate-filing threat), and a costly communication choice (Ina imposes in-person-only emergency contact).

Replaced abstraction-mantra diction with concrete coercion mechanics (broadcast clipping consequence, dispatch knock sequence, drafted referral/hold/lien forms, visit-list stop order) while preserving one inevitability line for Kwon and giving Ina more tactical/observational counters.

summary: Revised Chapter 14 to resolve all packet findings by restoring embodied causality in detention consequences, deepening the household-coercion aftermath, removing diegetic process leakage, and sharpening coercion dialogue with concrete leverage detail and clearer idiolect separation.
